proposal_rationale: The Warehouse Order Picking blueprint sits within Logistics & Supply Chain (canonical top-level) but needs a more specific sub-domain for 'warehouse operations' as distinct from broader supply chain topics like cross-docking, freight, or last-mile delivery. Proposing 'Warehousing' as a non-canonical sub-domain of Logistics & Supply Chain. Future blueprints on warehouse layout optimization, warehouse inbound/putaway operations, and warehouse labor management would share this sub-domain.

The Warehouse Order Picking blueprint is specifically scoped to e-commerce fulfillment (as distinct from traditional retail DC fulfillment or wholesale distribution). E-commerce has distinctive characteristics — time-varying arrival patterns driven by online order placement, same-day commitments, and peak-season surges like Black Friday/Prime Day — that warrant cross-cutting tagging. Proposing 'E-Commerce' as a non-canonical cross-cutting theme that future retail, delivery, and fulfillment blueprints would reuse.
